title: ItsMyConfig
description: A plugin that facilitates the work of configurators and adds functionalities to customize each message.
body:
## CONFIGURATION HAS NEVER BEEN EASIER
ItsMyConfig was created to facilitate and accelerate configuration. It integrates features like custom placeholders or the addition of PlaceholderAPI & MiniMessage support in the plugin of your choice!

## FEATURES
We’ve introduced exciting features, so that your players will never be bored!
### CUSTOM PLACEHOLDERS
Custom placeholders are easy to use and allow you to do many things. A concrete example: set the main color of your server as a placeholder and use it everywhere. It only takes a few seconds to change the theme of your server!
### ADVANCED REQUIREMENTS
With custom placeholders, you can add requirements of any type, allowing you to perform checks and return a value based on the results. The goal is to enable you to accomplish anything!
### ADD PLACEHOLDERAPI & MINIMESSAGE SUPPORT TO EVERY PLUGIN
The basic principle of ItsMyConfig is to add support for MiniMessage, PlaceholderAPI and Custom Tags to any message from any plugin as long as it is configurable. All you need is for the message to start with the symbol-prefix you have defined in the configuration. If a message starts with this symbol, ItsMyConfig can detect it and add support of everything.
### CUSTOM TAGS FOR AN INFINITE RANGE OF CUSTOMIZATION
In addition to the default tags of MiniMessage, ItsMyConfig adds a multitude of tags for all purposes: sending a message in the action bar, the title, playing a sound, and others to discover.
